title: Water Me!
description: Forces the player to water plants manually replacing the need of placing water nearby
body:
**Introducing Water Me!**

**Water Me!** is a mod that forces the player to water crops with a water bucket. Placing a water source nearby no longer works.

**Basic Concepts**

- A water bucket has 16 uses, each use equals one moisture. After all uses are gone, water bucket turns into an empty bucket
- Moisture decays over time. Decrease from max moisture (7) to the plant dying (-1) takes around an hour
- Moisture decrease rate can be changed in config. The default is 12 (more = longer to decrease)
- Water Me! also contains a panel that displays info in the top right about the crop/farmland you're looking at (to hide press I by default)

**Showcase Video**
